requirements.summary: Create hero section with Spider-Man parallax scrolling depth effects
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays Spider-Man imagery with multiple parallax layers
Scrolling creates visible depth effect with foreground and background moving at different speeds

file_operations.description: Create hero section component with parallax scrolling effects featuring Spider-Man. Include multiple layered divs for parallax depth (background city, mid-layer webs, foreground Spider-Man). Use scroll event listeners or Intersection Observer to calculate parallax offsets. Wire in the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/spiderman-hero.dim_1920x1080.png as the main hero image and frontend/public/assets/generated/city-background.dim_1600x900.png for the background layer.
Import and render the HeroSection component at the top of the main app layout to display it as the first section users see when visiting the site.

Create a custom hook to handle parallax scroll calculations. Accept speed multipliers for different layers and return transform values based on current scroll position. Optimize with requestAnimationFrame to ensure smooth animations without performance issues.

requirements.summary: Implement Spider-Man content sections for origin, powers, villains, and appearances
acceptanceCriteria: At least 4 distinct content sections with Spider-Man information
Each section is visually distinct and easy to navigate

file_operations.description: Create a section component detailing Spider-Man's origin story (Peter Parker, radioactive spider bite, Uncle Ben). Structure content with headings, paragraphs, and appropriate spacing for readability. Apply depth styling consistent with REQ-3.

Create a section component showcasing Spider-Man's powers and abilities (wall-crawling, spider-sense, web-slinging, strength, agility). Use a list or card layout to organize abilities. Apply depth styling consistent with REQ-3.

Create a section component featuring key Spider-Man villains (Green Goblin, Doctor Octopus, Venom, etc.). Use cards or grid layout to display each villain with brief descriptions. Apply depth styling consistent with REQ-3.

Create a section component highlighting notable comic book series and movie appearances (Amazing Spider-Man comics, MCU films, Spider-Verse). Organize chronologically or by medium. Apply depth styling consistent with REQ-3.
Import and render OriginSection, PowersSection, VillainsSection, and AppearancesSection components in sequence below the HeroSection to create the main content flow of the site.

requirements.summary: Apply depth effects across all sections using CSS transforms, shadows, and layering
acceptanceCriteria: Multiple sections feature depth effects using shadows and transforms
Visual hierarchy creates sense of depth across the page
Effects are consistent with the overall Spider-Man theme

file_operations.description: Add utility classes and base styles for depth effects including layered box-shadows (multiple shadow layers for 3D appearance), transform properties (translateZ, perspective), and z-index utilities. Define CSS custom properties for consistent depth values across sections. Wire in the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/web-pattern.dim_800x800.png as a repeating background pattern for depth texture.

Create a reusable card component with built-in depth effects using box-shadow, subtle transforms, and hover animations that enhance the 3D appearance. This component will be used across content sections for consistent depth styling.
Apply depth effects to the origin section using DepthCard component or depth utility classes from index.css. Include layered shadows and subtle perspective transforms to create visual depth.
Apply depth effects to the powers section using DepthCard component or depth utility classes. Create stacked or layered appearance for power cards with varying shadow intensities.
Apply depth effects to the villains section using DepthCard component or depth utility classes. Use shadows and transforms to make villain cards appear to float or pop out from the background.
Apply depth effects to the appearances section using DepthCard component or depth utility classes. Layer timeline or media entries with depth shadows to create visual hierarchy.

requirements.summary: Design Spider-Man themed visual identity with red/blue color scheme and comic book aesthetics
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses Spider-Man's signature red and blue palette
Typography and layout evoke comic book style
Web patterns or Spider-Man motifs appear as design elements
Overall aesthetic is consistent across all sections

file_operations.description: Extend the Tailwind theme to include Spider-Man color palette (primary reds: #E62429, #CC0000; primary blues: #0D47A1, #1565C0; accent colors for contrast). Add custom font families that evoke comic book typography (bold, impactful display fonts). Configure custom spacing and border utilities for dynamic angles.

Define global typography styles using bold, comic-inspired fonts for headings. Add CSS for web pattern overlays using the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/web-pattern.dim_800x800.png as a subtle repeating background. Include base styles for angled section dividers and comic-style borders. Set body background using Spider-Man color scheme.

Create a header component with Spider-Man branding including the site title 'Spider-Man Hub' and the generated icon frontend/public/assets/generated/spiderman-icon.dim_256x256.png. Style with red and blue theme colors, bold typography, and optional web pattern background for consistent branding.
Import and render the Header component at the very top of the app layout to establish consistent branding across all pages and sections.
Apply Spider-Man themed styling to the hero section including red and blue color overlays, comic-style typography for the hero headline, and web pattern accents to reinforce the theme.
Apply consistent Spider-Man theme styling including red/blue color accents, comic-style headings, and web pattern details to the origin section.
Apply consistent Spider-Man theme styling including red/blue color accents, comic-style headings, and web pattern details to the powers section.
Apply consistent Spider-Man theme styling including red/blue color accents, comic-style headings, and web pattern details to the villains section.
Apply consistent Spider-Man theme styling including red/blue color accents, comic-style headings, and web pattern details to the appearances section.
